title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's Travel Rule enforcement pivot from guidance to active audits, South Korea's Q4 institutional custody framework deadline, and Indonesia's Q3 OJK custody standards activation create synchronized compliance infrastructure requirements across 220+ exchanges, banks, and VASPs representing $195M+ addressable spend through Q4 2026. AUSTRAC's enforcement posture shift eliminates "wait and see" positioning while FSC and OJK timelines compress decision cycles for institutions that delayed Phas
